Off Calendar Oct-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Mason McDuffie Real Estate, Inc. dba Prudential California Realty, Kathleen Crandall and Candice Economides' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Supplemental Special Interrogatories And For Sanctions.
1. Motion To Compel Further Responses To Supplemental Special Interrogatories granted. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses to the defendants' supplemental special interrogatories within five days of the date of this order;
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $350.00, to run against plaintiff and its counsel of record, payable within thirty days of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.
